html:
Myles is the maester in service at Sunspear.

Other characters named Myles include:

  • Myles, squire of Ser Desmond Grell
  • Myles Greenfield, a knight from House Greenfield during the reign of King Daeron II Targaryen
  • Myles Hightower, a knight from House Hightower and cousin of Lord Lyonel Hightower
  • Myles Manwoody, a knight and brother of Lord Dagos Manwoody
  • Myles Mooton, a knight and brother of Lord William Mooton
  • Myles Smallwood, a Lord of Acorn Hall and Hand of the King for King Jaehaerys I Targaryen
  • Myles Toyne, called "Blackheart", a former captain-general of the Golden Company
  • Myles, a character created for the video game Game of Thrones
